====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Hala |pkmn=Crabrawler |type1=Fighting |img= |epnum=HOR04 |epname=Mastering the Z-Move! |desc={{p|Crabrawler}} is Hala's only known Pokémon. He used it to demonstrate a [[Z-Move]] to {{OBP|Akira|Horizon}} and [[Mana]]. None of Crabrawler's moves are known{{tt|*|Crabrawler is implied to know a Normal-type attack through its use of Breakneck Blitz}}.
Crabrawler can also perform the [[Z-Move]] {{m|Breakneck Blitz}}.}}
